titleStmt.title: SII 7.536: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer

No. 536. (A.R. No. 310 of 1901). This inscription is noticed in the South-Indian Inscriptions, Vol. I, p. 126. ON THE EAST WALL OF THE GANGAIKONDAN-MANDAPA AT MAMALLAPURAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The beginning and end of this inscription are lost.mayalvarunti cempiyaṉkiḻānaṭi Orumaruṅ kuṭanamar n=ti ruppa Aruḷcamaiya poṟkoṭ ṭi
maiyappāvaiyuñ civaṉumpol puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum cemponvirasiṁ- hāsaṉattu viṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kovirācakecaripanma rāna tri puvaṉaccak
karavarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade varkku yāṇṭu patinālāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āmurkoṭṭattu Āmurnāṭṭu
puramāṉa [jananāta]purattu Āḷuṭaiyār tirumu muṭaiyārkku tiruppaḷḷieḻuccisantikku tiruamutupaṭikku Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu
(veṇṭu)vanattukku nilaṅ koṇṭu viṭukaikku maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattu kaṉṟunāṭṭu Aṇaikkaraiputtūr viyāpāri kuḷantaikiḻāṉ
tevan vaṭukanāraṇan yittevar śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu paṉniraṇṭu yikkācu panṉiraṇṭum yinnakaratto(m)mum periḷa(m)maiyomu
m Ittevar Ātidāsa caṇṭeśva rar kaiyāl nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷurp piṭākai kaṭu
curan perumāḷeri kaḻaniyāna panmāyecuvaraviḷaākattu tevatāna(m)ppaṭi ceṟu me
lvarampukku mekku tenpākkellai yiṭaiyanyeri Erivāyil tirukaḻuku naṟpa vaḻikku vaṭakkum melpāṟThe beginning and end of this inscription are lost.
Digital edition of SII 7.536 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
